_comment: GOLD-SET REGISTRY — single source of truth for which key is LIVE per sol (sol -> active_version + key_type). Nothing else guesses liveness. Authored by Code per Brain card-64 Q2 (whole-set registry). key_type enum = {full_verdict, oos_detection}. Construction packages are oos_detection (engine honest-fails OUT_OF_SCOPE, no verdict); discrete supply/repair/services are full_verdict.

supersedes.reason: same CONTENT, wrong SCHEMA — caution_reasons shape was un-gradeable by scoreJudgment (card-71 finding); re-expressed as v3 in the JudgmentKey/namedGates schema. Retired byte-identical.
partial source (pre-complete); restored to full_verdict CAUTION against certified-complete source per #4 in-scope ruling (cards 66/68); caution basis source-corrected (card 67).
reclassified full_verdict->oos_detection per construction honest-fail ruling 2026-06-26; old key retired in place, byte-identical, content untouched

FA860126Q00260001._synthetic_note: Real unrestricted commercial base package (fetched from SAM, source of record) + a clearly-labeled [SYNTHETIC-ADVERSARIAL] mod imposing a Government-controlled First Article contradiction (60-day non-waivable FAT precondition vs 30-day-ARO binding delivery) → NO_BID. v2 (cards 75-R1/76-R1): the mod lives in a recognized SECTION F (supersedes base §F 90-day + SOW §IV 8-month) so the agentic engine grounds it; §B grounded from the real CLIN; the 60>30 net-effect conclusion is demoted to the §F provenance banner (human authoring note, NOT lens-readable body) so the engine must DERIVE the conflict. keySha d08c3017.

supersedes.reason: card 75-R1/76-R1 + CEO ratify (77-R1): v1 placed the synthetic mod as a trailing unattributed AMENDMENT block → the section detector never assigned it to §F → the agentic engine never grounded the impossibility (graduation run #38 derived INCOMPLETE). v2 re-places it as a recognized §F (supersedes base delivery terms), grounds §B, and demotes the conclusion to the provenance banner. Retired byte-identical; v1 frozen artifact NOT mutated.
